core_mechanism: an explicit structure-preserving bijection between the labeled vertices of a graph and the elements of an algebraically-classified set, so that the graph's incidence/labeling encodes relations among the algebraic objects, with the correspondence derived from elementary operations in one underlying group
brief_reason: The abstract constructs and explains a correspondence assigning discrete subgroups (conjugacy classes) to the nodes of the affine E8 Dynkin diagram using only elementary properties of PSL2, i.e. a vertex-to-class bijection encoding an algebraic classification onto a labeled graph.
